pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 8 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.4.2 to 3.1.4, which requires Java 17 and introduces breaking API changes.
Upgrade Camunda External Task Client to 7.20.0 to ensure compatibility with the new Spring Boot and Java versions.
Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) as JUnit 4 is deprecated and Jupiter is the standard for modern Java testing.
Upgrade Mockito to 4.10.0 to ensure compatibility with JUnit 5 and Java 17.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.11.0 and configure it to use the new Java 17 source/target settings.
Add project metadata such as name, description, organization, and developers to the POM.
Add a Maven profile for signing artifacts during release using GPG.
Add Maven Source Plugin to attach source jars during the build process.
Add License Maven Plugin to manage and check license headers in source files.
Configure resource filtering for src/main/resources-filtered to allow property substitution.
Update Maven Release Plugin to 3.0.1 for better release management capabilities.
Update Maven Javadoc Plugin to 3.5.0 for compatibility with Java 17 documentation generation.
Update Versions Maven Plugin to 2.15.0 for dependency version management.
Add Gitflow Maven Plugin to support Gitflow branching strategies.
Set the scope of the Camunda External Task Client to 'provided' as it is expected to be available in the runtime environment.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven target directory to gitignore to exclude build artifacts.
Add .local directory to gitignore to exclude local configuration or data.
Add IntelliJ IDEA specific files and directories to gitignore.
